welcome.title: Welcome to CoFoundery Align
welcome.hint: This is not only about who you find. It is about how well you can actually work together.

name.title: What should we call you?
name.hint: This is how you will appear in your profile and in matching.

role.title: Choose the role that fits where you are right now.

focus.title: What is your main focus?
focus.hint: This helps us understand your profile in the right context later.

intention.title: What are you working on right now?
intention.hint: Your intention helps us set the right context for matching and collaboration.

avatar.title: Would you like to add a picture?
avatar.hint: Optional. You can also do this later.

next.title: What happens next
next.hint: You are not heading into just another form, but into a product that makes collaboration clearer early.

onboarding.welcomeText: You are only creating your core profile now. It takes a moment and then brings you straight into the product.
onboarding.roleBothDescription: You are currently active both as a founder and from an advisory perspective.
onboarding.roleAdvisorDescription: You support founder teams from an advisory perspective.
onboarding.roleFounderDescription: You use CoFoundery for your own matching, profile, and alignment.
onboarding.focusOtherPlaceholder: If you like, describe your focus more specifically here
onboarding.avatarSkipHint: It is completely fine to skip this for now.

nextCards.profileText: Your core profile gives your start a clear direction.
nextCards.insightsText: Your answers make differences and patterns easier to discuss.
nextCards.collaborationText: This becomes clearer conversations, reports, and later concrete working agreements.

onboarding.nonDiagnosticHint: CoFoundery Align is not a personality test. It helps you make collaboration clearer and more resilient early.

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.help: Optional. You can set it now or change it later in the dashboard.

edit.rolesHelp: The core role for your onboarding is already set. Here you can activate additional modes.
edit.advisorRoleHelp: Use CoFoundery to support founder teams as an advisor as well.
edit.founderRoleHelp: Use CoFoundery for your own founder profile, matching, and alignment.

Suche.label: Searching
Suche.description: You want to see early who collaboration could really work with.

Partner-Match.label: Partner match
Partner-Match.description: You want to clarify fit and differences in a specific co-founder constellation.

Selbsttest.label: Self-check
Selbsttest.description: You first want to understand your own profile and way of working more clearly.
